text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The venue for the Takarazuka Kinen is filled with
many fans who were swayed by her running in the
Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon steps into the arena for today's
G1 race against the backdrop of her cheering
fans.
